title: Authorization Request Parameters (RFC 6749 + RFC 7636 + RFC 8707)
description: Parameters the MCP server passes to buildAuthorizationUrl. Validates the shape of the authorization request constructed by OAuthService.

code_challenge.description: S256 challenge: BASE64URL(SHA256(code_verifier)) is always 43 chars

resource.description: RFC 8707 resource indicator — present only when resourceUri is configured
